symptom: Chat shows '생각 중...' indefinitely. Warning text never appears.

eventstream_tab.status: ZERO events — SSE body not parsed by browser

cors_fix_verification.cors_errors_in_console: NONE — no CORS errors at all

console_log.info: Browser detection: Chrome 146, APLUS INIT SUCCESS

hypothesis_result: REJECTED — CORS was NOT the root cause. CORS headers are now correct (specific origin + credentials:true), no CORS console errors, but EventStream still shows 0 events.

hypotheses_tested_and_rejected: #363-#368: HTTP/2 vs HTTP/1.1, hold+close, timing delay — all REJECTED
#375: CORS fix (ACAO specific origin + ACAC true) — REJECTED

remaining_issues.EventStream_zero: Browser receives 200 OK + chunked SSE body but parses ZERO events
remaining_issues.possible_root_cause: Connection:close may cause browser to treat SSE as completed response. OR chunked encoding format is malformed. OR SSE event format doesn't match what qwen3 JS expects.

recommendations.priority_1: FIX Connection header: Change 'close' to 'keep-alive'. This has been wrong in ALL 10 attempts and is the ONLY remaining header difference vs real qwen3.
recommendations.priority_2: Verify chunked encoding format: Ensure hex-size CRLF data CRLF format is correct with proper 0 CRLF CRLF terminator.
recommendations.priority_3: FALLBACK: Switch qwen3 to non-SSE error response (HTML error page or JSON error) instead of SSE stream injection. 10 failures suggests SSE injection approach may be fundamentally incompatible.
recommendations.priority_4: Consider that qwen3 JS may validate response structure beyond headers (e.g., checking for specific JSON fields in SSE data lines).
